use_cases: Form submission triggers with default, destructive, and secondary variants
Navigation actions using ghost and link variants
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
Accessible interactive elements with focus-visible states and keyboard support
Composed into larger components via asChild prop with Radix Slot
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with 6 style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 size options (default, sm, lg, icon). Built on Radix UI primitives with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Supports composition via asChild prop, accessible focus states, and disabled states. Clean flat design with standard Tailwind styling suitable for any modern web application.
